_comment: Seed eval set for `adk eval`. Schema varies by ADK version — the SAFE way to author cases is: run `adk web`, create a session, open the Eval tab, 'Add current session'. This file shows the INTENT of three scenarios so you know what to capture.

scenarios.name: imminent_high_effort_task
scenarios.given: 3 tasks. Task A due in 2h with ~4h effort remaining. Tasks B and C due next week, low effort.
scenarios.expected_outcome: Most-at-risk = Task A. Agent recognizes it is undeliverable in time and drafts an extension/status email. Exactly one intervention.

scenarios.name: all_tasks_comfortable
scenarios.given: 3 tasks, all due 5+ days out with small effort estimates and open calendar.
scenarios.expected_outcome: Agent reports no task at risk and takes NO intervention. Must not manufacture urgency.

scenarios.name: blank_page_blocker
scenarios.given: 1 task due in 18h with ~3h effort, calendar has a free evening block, no subtasks yet.
scenarios.expected_outcome: Agent blocks the free evening and generates a starter outline so the task is unblocked, rather than emailing for an extension.
